title: AN ACT TO AMEND ARTICLE ONE HUNDRED SIXTY-THREE OF THE REVISED PENAL CODE

chunks.text:
S. No. 595 / 62 OG No. 20, 3356 (May 16, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4202, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ARTICLE ONE HUNDRED SIXTY-THREE OF THE REVISED PENAL CODE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Article One Hundred Sixty-three of the Revised Penal Code is hereby amended to read as follows:

"Art. 163.

Making and importing and uttering false coins.

-Any person who makes, imports, or utters false coins, in connivance with counterfeiters or importers, shall suffer:

Prision Mayor

in its minimum and medium periods and a fine not to exceed 10,000 pesos, if the counterfeited coin be silver, coin of the Philippines or coin of the Central Bank of the Philippines of ten-centavo denomination or above.

Prision correcional

in its minimum and medium periods and a fine not to exceed 2,000 pesos if the counterfeited coins be any of the minor coinage of the Philippines or of the Central Bank of the Philippines below ten-centavo denomination.

Prision correcional

in its minimum period and a fine not to exceed 1,000 pesos, if the counterfeited coin be currency of a foreign country."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
